Join Us

A job at CMC is more than just a career. It's an opportunity to make a difference in your community. We are a mission-driven team committed to providing quality healthcare to everyone in our community.

Provider Positions

Physicians, nurse practitioners, dentists, behavioral health providers, and other clinical roles.

View Provider Jobs

All Other Positions

Administrative, support, and non-clinical roles across all CMC locations.

View All Jobs

Benefits

Competitive Compensation
Market-rate salaries that reflect your experience and expertise.
Generous Leave
Paid vacation, sick time, and holiday coverage so you can recharge.
Comprehensive Insurance
Medical, dental, vision, life, AD&D, disability, EAP, and retirement plans.
Professional Development
Grow alongside us, advancing your skills with continued education and certification support.

Frequently Asked Questions

What's the hiring process like?
  • - Apply – Submit your application online
  • - Review – Recruiters assess your qualifications.
  • - Next Steps – If you're a match, we'll reach out for an interview.
  • - Interviews – Zoom or in-person, often with a panel.
  • - Offer – Sent via Paycom; respond within 3 business days.
  • - Pre-Employment – Background check, reference check, and physical exam.
How do I apply?
  • - External: cmcenters.org/careers
  • - Internal: Log into ESS via Paycom.
  • - Students: Apply online and send your resume to careers@cmcenters.org.
What qualifications do I need?
Check the job description for required skill and experience before applying.
How long until I hear back?
Immediate email confirmation from Paycom after applying. High-volume roles: 4–6 weeks. Recruiters will contact you if more info is needed.
Can I apply for more than one role?
Yes, you'll be considered for all positions that fit your background.
Will I know if I'm not selected?
Yes, we send email notifications at various stages.
What's the interview process like?
Most interviews are done via Zoom with at least two panelists. Some take place in-person, especially for administrative roles.
Do I need a cover letter?
Optional, but a great way to stand out.
What benefits does CMC offer?
  • - Loan repayment programs (HRSA, SLRP, CAL HealthCares, HCAi, Song Brown)
  • - Free CME
  • - Medical, dental, vision insurance (Kaiser/Sutter options)
  • - Flexible spending accounts + dependent care match
  • - Life & disability insurance
  • - 403(b) retirement savings
  • - Paid time off, sick leave, and holidays

For Stockton Residents

Mobile Community Response: In partnership with the City of Stockton, Community Medical Centers offers an alternative to 911 for Stockton citizens in need of behavioral health services. If you or someone you know is experiencing mental distress, please call (833) 311-2273, 7 days a week, 8:00 am to 11:00 pm. This helpline is for non-violent individuals with mild to moderate symptoms.
